metadata.title: NHTSA Standing General Order ADS incident reports
metadata.coverage: Reports received under the third amended SGO through May 15, 2026
metadata.transformation: Kept the highest Report Version per Report ID; removed entities, VINs, coordinates, addresses, narratives, and other direct identifiers.
limitations: These are reports meeting SGO criteria, not a census of every automated-driving crash.
Counts are not normalized by fleet size, miles, operating domain, or reporting access.
Initial reports can be incomplete or unverified, and reporting requirements differ between ADS and Level 2 ADAS.
A report count by itself is not a crash rate and cannot establish comparative safety.
